last_command: PRD restructured: 3 epics (A/B/C), FR-S5 relocated to ai-agency, GARCH lib corrected, cross-PRD contracts added
notes: Split into 3 right-sized epics: A (Statistical Foundation, 5 issues, arch+statsmodels+FRED), B (ML Classification, 4 issues, scikit-learn), C (Neural Models, 4 issues, PyTorch Lightning). FR-S5 (indicator weight validation) moved to ai-agency-evolution Epic 5. Cross-PRD contracts established for WeightSnapshot, context rendering, and Volatility Agent.
